---
title: "Merge Cleaned Datasets v7 (Robust Closure/Event Matching)"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
if (!requireNamespace("data.table", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("data.table")
if (!requireNamespace("sf", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("sf")
if (!requireNamespace("lubridate", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("lubridate")
if (!requireNamespace("readxl", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("readxl")

library(data.table)
library(sf)
library(lubridate)
library(readxl)
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------
# Paths / Parameters
# ---------------------------
# This section defines all input/output locations and merge parameters in one place.
# We use full paths so the script works regardless of the current working directory.
tz_nyc <- "America/New_York"
crs_target <- 2263          # NYC State Plane
pluto_geom_crs <- 4326      # PLUTO geom is typically lon/lat WKT

# Inputs
base_dir <- "C:/Users/ekans/Desktop/DS340W"
crime_dir <- file.path(base_dir, "Datasets", "Clean")
pluto_path <- file.path(base_dir, "Datasets", "Clean", "Primary_Land_Use_Tax_Lot_Output_PLUTO_core_landuse_zoning.csv")
closures_raw_path <- file.path(base_dir, "Datasets", "Street_Closures_due_to_Construction_Activities_by_Block_and_Intersection_20260121.csv")
events_path <- file.path(base_dir, "Datasets", "Clean", "NYC_Permitted_Events_Clean.csv")
weather_daily_path <- file.path(base_dir, "Datasets", "Clean", "Weather_Clean_Daily.csv")
weather_raw_path <- file.path(base_dir, "Datasets", "weather.xls")
holidays_path <- file.path(base_dir, "Datasets", "Clean", "Holidays.csv")

# Outputs (write to Clean/Combined with Updated_ prefix)
point_out <- file.path(base_dir, "Datasets", "Clean", "Combined", "Updated_Crime_Enriched_PointLevel_v7.csv")

# Matching rules
buffer_m <- 100
time_window_hours <- 3
buffer_units <- if (crs_target == 2263) buffer_m * 3.28084 else buffer_m

# Performance tuning
pluto_chunk_size <- 200000  # adjust up/down based on RAM

# ---------------------------
# Helper functions
# ---------------------------
pick_latest_file <- function(dir, pattern) {
  files <- list.files(dir, pattern = pattern, full.names = TRUE)
  if (length(files) == 0) stop("No matching files found: ", pattern)
  files[which.max(file.info(files)$mtime)]
}

parse_dt_safe <- function(x, fmt = "%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S") {
  x <- trimws(as.character(x))
  x[x == ""] <- NA
  as.POSIXct(x, format = fmt, tz = tz_nyc)
}

parse_dt_multi <- function(x, fmts) {
  x <- trimws(as.character(x))
  x[x == ""] <- NA
  out <- as.POSIXct(rep(NA, length(x)), tz = tz_nyc)
  for (fmt in fmts) {
    idx <- is.na(out) & !is.na(x)
    if (!any(idx)) break
    out[idx] <- as.POSIXct(x[idx], format = fmt, tz = tz_nyc)
  }
  out
}

num_clean <- function(x) {
  x <- gsub(",", ".", as.character(x))
  x <- gsub("[^0-9\\.-]", "", x)
  suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
}

chunk_indices <- function(n, chunk_size) {
  split(seq_len(n), ceiling(seq_len(n) / chunk_size))
}

normalize_precinct_code <- function(x) {
  x <- trimws(as.character(x))
  x[x == ""] <- NA_character_
  out <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(as.numeric(x)))
  out[is.na(out)] <- NA_integer_
  as.character(out)
}

parse_iso_utc_to_local <- function(x) {
  x <- trimws(as.character(x))
  x[x == ""] <- NA_character_
  utc <- suppressWarnings(lubridate::ymd_hms(x, tz = "UTC", quiet = TRUE))
  local <- suppressWarnings(lubridate::with_tz(utc, tzone = tz_nyc))
  as.POSIXct(local, tz = tz_nyc)
}
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------
# Load crime data
# ---------------------------
# This section loads the cleaned NYPD complaints file and builds a reliable crime_time.
crime_path <- file.path(base_dir, "Datasets", "Clean", "NYPD_Complains_20060101_20241231_Clean.csv")
crime <- fread(crime_path)

# Normalize column names (trim whitespace / hidden chars)
setnames(crime, trimws(names(crime)))

# Create crime_time (robust to column name casing/whitespace)
nm <- names(crime)
nm_low <- tolower(nm)
col_has <- function(x) any(nm_low == tolower(x))
col_name <- function(x) nm[which(nm_low == tolower(x))[1]]

if (col_has("occurred_dt")) {
  cd <- col_name("occurred_dt")
  crime[, crime_time := as.POSIXct(get(cd), tz = tz_nyc)]
} else if (col_has("cmplnt_fr_dt") && col_has("cmplnt_fr_tm")) {
  cdt <- col_name("cmplnt_fr_dt")
  ctm <- col_name("cmplnt_fr_tm")
  crime[, crime_time := as.POSIXct(
    paste(get(cdt), format(get(ctm), "%H:%M:%S")),
    tz = tz_nyc
  )]
} else if (col_has("day")) {
  cd <- col_name("day")
  crime[, crime_time := as.POSIXct(get(cd), tz = tz_nyc)]
} else {
  stop("No usable time columns in crime dataset. Found columns: ", paste(nm, collapse = ", "))
}

# Create a date-only column for joins and filtering
crime[, crime_date := as.Date(crime_time)]
crime[, row_id := .I]

# Enforce analysis window and valid coordinates early to reduce data volume
crime <- crime[!is.na(crime_date) &
                 crime_date >= as.Date("2006-01-01") &
                 crime_date <= as.Date("2024-12-31")]
crime <- crime[!is.na(latitude) & !is.na(longitude)]
crime <- crime[latitude != 0 & longitude != 0]
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------
# PLUTO join (chunked point-in-polygon)
# ---------------------------
# This section assigns each crime point to a PLUTO parcel polygon (land use context).
# Chunking prevents memory spikes during spatial joins.
# Build minimal crime points for spatial join
crime_pts <- crime[!is.na(latitude) & !is.na(longitude), .(row_id, latitude, longitude)]
crime_pts_sf <- st_as_sf(crime_pts, coords = c("longitude", "latitude"), crs = 4326, remove = FALSE)
crime_pts_sf <- st_transform(crime_pts_sf, crs_target)

# Prefer cleaned PLUTO, but if it lacks geom, fall back to raw PLUTO with geom
pluto <- fread(pluto_path)
if (!("geom" %in% names(pluto))) {
  message("PLUTO geom missing in cleaned file; reading raw PLUTO with geom.")
  pluto_raw_path <- file.path(base_dir, "Datasets", "Primary_Land_Use_Tax_Lot_Output_(PLUTO)_20260121.csv")
  raw_cols <- names(fread(pluto_raw_path, nrows = 0))

  core_cols <- c(
    "borough", "borocode", "Tax block", "Tax lot", "BBL",
    "xcoord", "ycoord", "latitude", "longitude",
    "policeprct", "council district", "community board",
    "bct2020", "bctcb2020", "census tract 2010", "tract2010",
    "postcode"
  )

  landuse_cols <- c(
    "landuse", "bldgclass",
    "lotarea", "bldgarea", "comarea", "resarea", "officearea",
    "retailarea", "garagearea", "strgearea", "factryarea", "otherarea",
    "numbldgs", "numfloors", "unitsres", "unitstotal",
    "yearbuilt", "yearalter1", "yearalter2",
    "builtfar", "residfar", "commfar", "facilfar"
  )

  zoning_cols <- c(
    "zonedist1", "zonedist2", "zonedist3", "zonedist4",
    "overlay1", "overlay2",
    "spdist1", "spdist2", "spdist3",
    "ltdheight", "splitzone"
  )

  keep_cols <- unique(c(core_cols, landuse_cols, zoning_cols, "geom"))
  keep_cols <- intersect(keep_cols, raw_cols)

  if (!("geom" %in% keep_cols)) {
    stop("PLUTO geom column not found in raw file.")
  }

  pluto <- fread(pluto_raw_path, select = keep_cols)
}

pluto[, geom := trimws(as.character(geom))]
pluto[geom == "", geom := NA_character_]
pluto <- pluto[!is.na(geom)]

# Some environments throw s2-related errors on WKT; disable s2 for robust parsing
sf::sf_use_s2(FALSE)
pluto_sf <- st_as_sf(
  pluto,
  wkt = "geom",
  crs = pluto_geom_crs,
  remove = FALSE
)
sf::sf_use_s2(TRUE)
pluto_sf <- st_transform(pluto_sf, crs_target)

# Chunked spatial join to reduce memory spikes
chunks <- chunk_indices(nrow(crime_pts_sf), pluto_chunk_size)
pluto_joined_list <- vector("list", length(chunks))

for (i in seq_along(chunks)) {
  idx <- chunks[[i]]
  message("PLUTO join chunk ", i, "/", length(chunks), " (", length(idx), " points)")
  joined <- st_join(crime_pts_sf[idx, ], pluto_sf, join = st_within, left = TRUE)
  if ("landuse" %in% names(joined)) {
    joined$landuse[is.na(joined$landuse)] <- "UNKNOWN"
  }
  pluto_joined_list[[i]] <- st_drop_geometry(joined)
  rm(joined)
  gc()
}

pluto_joined <- rbindlist(pluto_joined_list, use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)

# Merge back to full crime table
crime_pluto <- merge(crime, pluto_joined, by = "row_id", all.x = TRUE)

# Remove duplicate lat/long columns if present (post-join cleanup)
dup_latlon <- intersect(c("latitude.x", "longitude.x", "latitude.y", "longitude.y"),
                        names(crime_pluto))
if (length(dup_latlon) > 0) {
  crime_pluto[, (dup_latlon) := NULL]
}
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------
# Road closures (raw, with times) -> within 100m and +/- 3 hours
# ---------------------------
# This section matches each crime to nearby construction closures in space/time.
closures <- fread(closures_raw_path)
closures <- closures[!is.na(WKT) & trimws(WKT) != ""]

# Parse datetime (handle multiple source column names/formats)
if ("start_dt" %in% names(closures)) {
  closures[, closure_start_time := as.POSIXct(start_dt, tz = tz_nyc)]
} else if ("WorkStartDate" %in% names(closures)) {
  closures[, closure_start_time := parse_dt_multi(
    WorkStartDate,
    c("%Y %b %d %I:%M:%S %p", "%Y %b %d %H:%M:%S", "%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S", "%m/%d/%Y %I:%M:%S %p")
  )]
} else {
  stop("No recognizable closure start time column.")
}

if ("end_dt" %in% names(closures)) {
  closures[, closure_end_time := as.POSIXct(end_dt, tz = tz_nyc)]
} else if ("WorkEndDate" %in% names(closures)) {
  closures[, closure_end_time := parse_dt_multi(
    WorkEndDate,
    c("%Y %b %d %I:%M:%S %p", "%Y %b %d %H:%M:%S", "%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S", "%m/%d/%Y %I:%M:%S %p")
  )]
} else {
  closures[, closure_end_time := closure_start_time]
}

closures[is.na(closure_end_time) & !is.na(closure_start_time), closure_end_time := closure_start_time]
swap_idx <- !is.na(closures$closure_start_time) & !is.na(closures$closure_end_time) &
  closures$closure_end_time < closures$closure_start_time
if (any(swap_idx)) {
  tmp_start <- closures$closure_start_time[swap_idx]
  closures$closure_start_time[swap_idx] <- closures$closure_end_time[swap_idx]
  closures$closure_end_time[swap_idx] <- tmp_start
}
closures[, start_dt := closure_start_time]
closures[, end_dt := closure_end_time]
cat("Closures parsed rows:", nrow(closures), "\n")
cat("Closures with non-missing start_dt:", sum(!is.na(closures$start_dt)), "\n")
cat("Closures with non-missing end_dt:", sum(!is.na(closures$end_dt)), "\n")

# Geometry (coordinates appear in State Plane already)
closures_sf <- st_as_sf(closures, wkt = "WKT", crs = crs_target, remove = FALSE)

# Initialize closure features on main table
crime_pluto[, `:=`(
  closure_count_100m = 0L,
  closure_dist_min = NA_real_,
  closure_active_flag = 0L
)]

# Build sf points for spatial matching
crime_pts2 <- crime_pluto[!is.na(latitude) & !is.na(longitude), .(row_id, crime_time, latitude, longitude)]
crime_pts2$crime_day <- as.Date(crime_pts2$crime_time)
crime_pts2_sf <- st_as_sf(crime_pts2, coords = c("longitude", "latitude"), crs = 4326, remove = FALSE)
crime_pts2_sf <- st_transform(crime_pts2_sf, crs_target)

# Compute closure features per crime (by day to limit size and memory)
crime_days <- sort(unique(crime_pts2$crime_day))

for (d in crime_days) {
  day_start <- as.POSIXct(d, tz = tz_nyc)
  day_end <- day_start + lubridate::days(1)

  crimes_day <- crime_pts2_sf[crime_pts2$crime_day == d, ]
  if (nrow(crimes_day) == 0) next

  # Closures overlapping that day (broad filter)
  clos_day <- closures_sf[!is.na(closures_sf$start_dt) &
                            closures_sf$start_dt <= day_end &
                            closures_sf$end_dt >= day_start, ]
  if (nrow(clos_day) == 0) next

  message("Closures day ", d, ": crimes=", nrow(crimes_day), " closures=", nrow(clos_day))

  # Spatial candidates within 100m (vectorized)
  idx_list <- st_is_within_distance(crimes_day, clos_day, dist = buffer_units)
  if (all(lengths(idx_list) == 0)) next

  crime_idx <- rep(seq_along(idx_list), lengths(idx_list))
  clos_idx <- unlist(idx_list)

  # Build candidate pairs table
  pairs <- data.table(
    row_id = crimes_day$row_id[crime_idx],
    crime_time = crimes_day$crime_time[crime_idx],
    clos_start = clos_day$start_dt[clos_idx],
    clos_end = clos_day$end_dt[clos_idx]
  )

  # Filter by time window
  wstart <- pairs$crime_time - hours(time_window_hours)
  wend <- pairs$crime_time + hours(time_window_hours)
  keep <- pairs$clos_start <= wend & pairs$clos_end >= wstart
  if (!any(keep)) next

  pairs <- pairs[keep]
  crime_idx_keep <- crime_idx[keep]
  clos_idx_keep <- clos_idx[keep]

  # Distances for kept pairs
  dists <- as.numeric(st_distance(
    st_geometry(crimes_day)[crime_idx_keep],
    st_geometry(clos_day)[clos_idx_keep],
    by_element = TRUE
  ))
  pairs[, dist := dists]

  # Aggregate per crime
  agg_pairs <- pairs[, .(
    closure_count_100m = .N,
    closure_dist_min = min(dist, na.rm = TRUE),
    closure_active_flag = 1L
  ), by = row_id]

  # Update main table in bulk
  crime_pluto[agg_pairs, on = "row_id", `:=`(
    closure_count_100m = i.closure_count_100m,
    closure_dist_min = i.closure_dist_min,
    closure_active_flag = i.closure_active_flag
  )]
}
cat("Closure matches >0:", sum(crime_pluto$closure_count_100m > 0, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------
# Permitted events (precinct + +/- 3 hours, day-by-day)
# ---------------------------
# This section matches crimes to permitted events by precinct and time window.
events <- fread(events_path)
if ("start_dt" %in% names(events)) {
  events[, event_start_time := as.POSIXct(start_dt, tz = tz_nyc)]
} else if ("Start Date/Time" %in% names(events)) {
  iso_start <- parse_iso_utc_to_local(events[["Start Date/Time"]])
  fallback_start <- parse_dt_multi(
    events[["Start Date/Time"]],
    c("%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S", "%m/%d/%Y %I:%M:%S %p", "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
  )
  events[, event_start_time := iso_start]
  events[is.na(event_start_time), event_start_time := fallback_start[is.na(event_start_time)]]
} else {
  stop("No recognizable event start time column.")
}

if ("end_dt" %in% names(events)) {
  events[, event_end_time := as.POSIXct(end_dt, tz = tz_nyc)]
} else if ("End Date/Time" %in% names(events)) {
  iso_end <- parse_iso_utc_to_local(events[["End Date/Time"]])
  fallback_end <- parse_dt_multi(
    events[["End Date/Time"]],
    c("%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S", "%m/%d/%Y %I:%M:%S %p", "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
  )
  events[, event_end_time := iso_end]
  events[is.na(event_end_time), event_end_time := fallback_end[is.na(event_end_time)]]
} else {
  events[, event_end_time := event_start_time]
}

events[is.na(event_end_time) & !is.na(event_start_time), event_end_time := event_start_time]
bad_span <- !is.na(events$event_start_time) & !is.na(events$event_end_time) & events$event_end_time < events$event_start_time
if (any(bad_span)) {
  tmp_start <- events$event_start_time[bad_span]
  events$event_start_time[bad_span] <- events$event_end_time[bad_span]
  events$event_end_time[bad_span] <- tmp_start
}
events[, start_dt := event_start_time]
events[, end_dt := event_end_time]
cat("Events parsed rows:", nrow(events), "\n")
cat("Events with non-missing start_dt:", sum(!is.na(events$start_dt)), "\n")
cat("Events with non-missing end_dt:", sum(!is.na(events$end_dt)), "\n")

# Ensure precinct column is numeric/text compatible
if ("Police Precinct" %in% names(events)) {
  events[, precinct := as.character(`Police Precinct`)]
} else if ("precinct" %in% names(events)) {
  events[, precinct := as.character(precinct)]
} else {
  stop("No recognizable precinct column in events.")
}

if ("addr_pct_cd" %in% names(crime_pluto)) {
  crime_pluto[, precinct := as.character(addr_pct_cd)]
} else if ("policeprct" %in% names(crime_pluto)) {
  crime_pluto[, precinct := as.character(policeprct)]
} else {
  stop("No recognizable precinct column in crime data.")
}

# Normalize and split events precincts safely
events[, precinct := gsub("[^0-9,\\.]", "", precinct)]
events[, event_row_id := .I]
events_expanded <- events[
  ,
  {
    txt <- as.character(precinct)
    if (is.na(txt) || txt == "") {
      .(precinct = NA_character_)
    } else {
      tokens <- trimws(unlist(strsplit(txt, ",", fixed = TRUE)))
      tokens <- tokens[tokens != ""]
      if (length(tokens) == 0) .(precinct = NA_character_) else .(precinct = tokens)
    }
  },
  by = event_row_id
]
events <- merge(
  events[, !c("precinct"), with = FALSE],
  events_expanded,
  by = "event_row_id",
  all.x = TRUE
)
events[, event_row_id := NULL]

events[, precinct := normalize_precinct_code(precinct)]
crime_pluto[, precinct := normalize_precinct_code(precinct)]
events <- events[!is.na(precinct) & precinct != ""]
crime_pluto <- crime_pluto[!is.na(precinct) & precinct != ""]
cat("Events rows after precinct expansion/cleaning:", nrow(events), "\n")
cat("Distinct event precincts:", uniqueN(events$precinct), "\n")
cat("Distinct crime precincts:", uniqueN(crime_pluto$precinct), "\n")

# Initialize event features
crime_pluto[, `:=`(event_count = 0L, has_event = 0L)]

# Pre-key events for non-equi joins
setkey(events, precinct, start_dt, end_dt)

# Process day by day to reduce join size and memory pressure
event_days <- sort(unique(as.Date(crime_pluto$crime_time)))
for (d in event_days) {
  day_start <- as.POSIXct(d, tz = tz_nyc)
  day_end <- day_start + days(1)

  crimes_day <- crime_pluto[crime_time >= day_start & crime_time < day_end &
                              !is.na(precinct),
                            .(row_id, precinct, crime_time)]
  if (nrow(crimes_day) == 0) next

  # Events overlapping this day (broad filter)
  events_day <- events[!is.na(start_dt) &
                         start_dt <= day_end & end_dt >= day_start]
  if (nrow(events_day) == 0) next

  crimes_day[, `:=`(
    wstart = crime_time - hours(time_window_hours),
    wend = crime_time + hours(time_window_hours)
  )]

  cand <- events_day[crimes_day,
                     on = .(precinct, start_dt <= wend, end_dt >= wstart),
                     nomatch = 0,
                     allow.cartesian = TRUE]

  if (nrow(cand) > 0) {
    agg_ev <- cand[, .(event_count = .N, has_event = 1L), by = row_id]
    crime_pluto[agg_ev, on = "row_id", `:=`(
      event_count = i.event_count,
      has_event = i.has_event
    )]
  }
}
cat("Event matches >0:", sum(crime_pluto$event_count > 0, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------
# Weather: daily + nearest observation within +/- 3 hours
# ---------------------------
# This section joins daily aggregates and the closest hourly observation.
weather_daily <- fread(weather_daily_path)
setnames(weather_daily, "date", "weather_date")
# Ensure weather_date is a Date
weather_daily[, weather_date := as.IDate(weather_date)]
# Ensure no duplicate weather columns before merge (including prior .x/.y runs)
weather_cols <- c("t_mean","t_min","t_max","rh_mean","wind_mean","at_mean","tw_mean","di_mean","obs_count")
weather_pattern <- paste0("^(", paste(weather_cols, collapse = "|"), ")(\\..+)?$")
# De-dup existing names to prevent data.table duplicate assignment errors
if (anyDuplicated(names(crime_pluto))) {
  setnames(crime_pluto, make.unique(names(crime_pluto)))
}
drop_cols <- unique(grep(weather_pattern, names(crime_pluto), value = TRUE))
if (length(drop_cols) > 0) {
  crime_pluto[, (drop_cols) := NULL]
}
# Guard against duplicate names inside weather_daily
if (anyDuplicated(names(weather_daily))) {
  setnames(weather_daily, make.unique(names(weather_daily)))
}
# Fast in-place join for daily weather
setkey(weather_daily, weather_date)
crime_pluto[weather_daily, on = .(crime_date = weather_date),
            (weather_cols) := mget(paste0("i.", weather_cols))]

# Nearest observation within +/- 3 hours from raw weather file
read_weather <- function(path) {
  dt <- NULL
  dt <- tryCatch({
    raw <- read_excel(path, col_names = FALSE)
    as.data.table(raw)
  }, error = function(e) NULL)

  if (is.null(dt)) {
    csv_tmp <- file.path(tempdir(), "weather_tmp.csv")
    src <- normalizePath(path, winslash = "\\", mustWork = TRUE)
    dst <- normalizePath(csv_tmp, winslash = "\\", mustWork = FALSE)
    `%+%` <- function(a, b) paste0(a, b)
    ps <- sprintf(
      "$excel = New-Object -ComObject Excel.Application; " %+%
        "$excel.Visible = $false; " %+%
        "$wb = $excel.Workbooks.Open('%s'); " %+%
        "$wb.SaveAs('%s', 6); " %+%
        "$wb.Close($false); " %+%
        "$excel.Quit();",
      src,
      dst
    )
    system2("powershell", args = c("-NoProfile", "-ExecutionPolicy", "Bypass", "-Command", ps))
    dt <- fread(csv_tmp, header = FALSE, encoding = "UTF-8", na.strings = c("", "NA"))
  }
  dt
}

raw_dt <- read_weather(weather_raw_path)
header_row <- which(grepl("^Local time", raw_dt[[1]]))[1]
if (is.na(header_row)) stop("Could not find header row in weather file.")

col_names <- as.character(unlist(raw_dt[header_row]))
obs <- raw_dt[(header_row + 1):.N]
setnames(obs, col_names)
obs <- obs[, which(!is.na(names(obs)) & trimws(names(obs)) != ""), with = FALSE]

old_time_col <- names(obs)[1]
setnames(obs, old_time_col, "local_time")
obs[, local_time := as.POSIXct(local_time, format = "%d.%m.%Y %H:%M", tz = tz_nyc)]
obs <- obs[!is.na(local_time)]

if ("T" %in% names(obs)) obs[, T := num_clean(T)] else stop("Missing T in weather file.")
if ("U" %in% names(obs)) obs[, U := num_clean(U)] else stop("Missing U in weather file.")
if ("Ff" %in% names(obs)) obs[, Ff := num_clean(Ff)] else obs[, Ff := NA_real_]

RH <- obs$U
T <- obs$T
V <- obs$Ff

e <- (RH / 100) * 6.105 * exp((17.2 * T) / (237.7 + T))
AT <- 1.07 * T + 0.2 * e - 0.65 * V - 2.7

a <- 0.151977
b <- 8.313659
c <- 1.676311
d <- 0.00391838
ecoef <- 0.023101
f <- 4.68035

Tw <- AT * atan(a * RH + b) + atan(AT + RH) - atan(RH - c) + d * RH^2 * atan(ecoef * RH) - f
DI <- 0.5 * Tw + 0.5 * AT

weather_obs <- obs[, .(
  local_time,
  t_obs = T,
  rh_obs = U,
  wind_obs = Ff,
  at_obs = AT,
  tw_obs = Tw,
  di_obs = DI
)]
setkey(weather_obs, local_time)

# Ensure crime_time exists for join
if (!("crime_time" %in% names(crime_pluto))) {
  if ("occurred_dt" %in% names(crime_pluto)) {
    crime_pluto[, crime_time := as.POSIXct(occurred_dt, tz = tz_nyc)]
  } else if (all(c("cmplnt_fr_dt", "cmplnt_fr_tm") %in% names(crime_pluto))) {
    crime_pluto[, crime_time := as.POSIXct(
      paste(cmplnt_fr_dt, format(cmplnt_fr_tm, "%H:%M:%S")),
      tz = tz_nyc
    )]
  } else {
    stop("crime_time missing and could not be reconstructed from available columns.")
  }
}

crime_times <- crime_pluto[!is.na(crime_time), .(row_id, crime_time_i = crime_time)]
crime_weather <- weather_obs[crime_times, on = .(local_time = crime_time_i), roll = "nearest",
                             .(row_id = i.row_id, crime_time_i = i.crime_time_i, local_time,
                               t_obs, rh_obs, wind_obs, at_obs, tw_obs, di_obs)]
crime_weather[, weather_time_diff_hrs := abs(as.numeric(difftime(crime_time_i, local_time, units = "hours")))]

# Enforce +/- window and blank out if no close observation
crime_weather[weather_time_diff_hrs > time_window_hours, `:=`(
  local_time = as.POSIXct(NA),
  t_obs = NA_real_,
  rh_obs = NA_real_,
  wind_obs = NA_real_,
  at_obs = NA_real_,
  tw_obs = NA_real_,
  di_obs = NA_real_
)]

# Initialize columns and join back by row_id
crime_pluto[, `:=`(
  weather_nearest_time = as.POSIXct(NA, tz = tz_nyc),
  weather_time_diff_hrs = NA_real_,
  t_nearest = NA_real_,
  rh_nearest = NA_real_,
  wind_nearest = NA_real_,
  at_nearest = NA_real_,
  tw_nearest = NA_real_,
  di_nearest = NA_real_
)]
crime_pluto[crime_weather, on = "row_id", `:=`(
  weather_nearest_time = i.local_time,
  weather_time_diff_hrs = i.weather_time_diff_hrs,
  t_nearest = i.t_obs,
  rh_nearest = i.rh_obs,
  wind_nearest = i.wind_obs,
  at_nearest = i.at_obs,
  tw_nearest = i.tw_obs,
  di_nearest = i.di_obs
)]
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------
# Holidays
# ---------------------------
# This section joins holiday flags by date.
hol <- fread(holidays_path)
hol[, date := as.Date(date)]
# Fast in-place join for holidays
setkey(hol, date)
holiday_cols <- setdiff(names(hol), "date")
crime_pluto[hol, on = .(crime_date = date),
            (holiday_cols) := mget(paste0("i.", holiday_cols))]
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------
# Write point-level enriched dataset
# ---------------------------
# Final cleanup and write to Updated_ output path in Clean/Combined.
# Drop geometry (point coords remain as columns)
crime_pluto_out <- crime_pluto

# Final cleanup: enforce window and valid coords after joins
crime_pluto_out <- crime_pluto_out[!is.na(crime_date) &
                                     crime_date >= as.Date("2006-01-01") &
                                     crime_date <= as.Date("2024-12-31")]
crime_pluto_out <- crime_pluto_out[!is.na(latitude) & !is.na(longitude)]
crime_pluto_out <- crime_pluto_out[latitude != 0 & longitude != 0]

# Remove any lingering duplicate lat/long columns
dup_latlon2 <- intersect(c("latitude.x", "longitude.x", "latitude.y", "longitude.y"),
                         names(crime_pluto_out))
if (length(dup_latlon2) > 0) {
  crime_pluto_out[, (dup_latlon2) := NULL]
}

fwrite(crime_pluto_out, point_out)
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------
# Validation checks (quick)
# ---------------------------
# Quick missingness report for key features.
key_cols <- c("crime_date", "crime_time", "latitude", "longitude")
weather_cols <- c("t_mean","t_min","t_max","rh_mean","wind_mean","at_mean","tw_mean","di_mean","obs_count",
                  "t_nearest","rh_nearest","wind_nearest","at_nearest","tw_nearest","di_nearest")
holiday_cols <- c("weekend","holiday","is_christian_holiday","is_islamic_holiday","is_jewish_holiday","is_hindu_holiday")

missing_report <- data.table(
  column = c(key_cols, weather_cols, holiday_cols)
)
missing_report[, pct_missing := sapply(column, function(col) {
  if (!(col %in% names(crime_pluto_out))) return(NA_real_)
  mean(is.na(crime_pluto_out[[col]])) * 100
})]

cat("Rows:", nrow(crime_pluto_out), "\n")
cat("Crime date range:", as.character(min(crime_pluto_out$crime_date, na.rm = TRUE)),
    "to", as.character(max(crime_pluto_out$crime_date, na.rm = TRUE)), "\n")

dup_names <- names(crime_pluto_out)[duplicated(names(crime_pluto_out))]
if (length(dup_names) > 0) {
  cat("Duplicate column names detected:", paste(unique(dup_names), collapse = ", "), "\n")
} else {
  cat("No duplicate column names detected.\n")
}

print(missing_report[order(-pct_missing)])
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------
# Validation checks (merge-specific)
# ---------------------------
# Sanity checks for date range, duplicate columns, and match features.
cat("Merge validation:\n")
cat("- Rows:", nrow(crime_pluto_out), "\n")
cat("- Crime date range:",
    as.character(min(crime_pluto_out$crime_date, na.rm = TRUE)),
    "to",
    as.character(max(crime_pluto_out$crime_date, na.rm = TRUE)), "\n")

# Ensure no duplicate lat/long columns
dup_latlon_final <- intersect(c("latitude.x", "longitude.x", "latitude.y", "longitude.y"),
                              names(crime_pluto_out))
cat("- Duplicate lat/lon columns present:", length(dup_latlon_final) > 0, "\n")

# Basic closure/event sanity
if ("closure_count_100m" %in% names(crime_pluto_out)) {
  cat("- closure_count_100m max:",
      suppressWarnings(max(crime_pluto_out$closure_count_100m, na.rm = TRUE)), "\n")
}
if ("closure_dist_min" %in% names(crime_pluto_out)) {
  cat("- closure_dist_min non-missing:",
      sum(!is.na(crime_pluto_out$closure_dist_min)), "\n")
}
if ("event_count" %in% names(crime_pluto_out)) {
  cat("- event_count max:",
      suppressWarnings(max(crime_pluto_out$event_count, na.rm = TRUE)), "\n")
}

# Invalid coord check
cat("- Zero lat count:", sum(crime_pluto_out$latitude == 0, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("- Zero lon count:", sum(crime_pluto_out$longitude == 0, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
```

```{r}
cat("Point-level output:", point_out, "\n")
```
